goal: Build a CNC machine-tender simulation: a UR10 robot picks raw blanks from an infeed conveyor, loads each blank into a CNC fixture prim, waits a fixed simulated machining dwell (30 s sim-time via step-count), then unloads the finished part to an outfeed conveyor. Exercises the load-wait-unload cycle pattern with sensor-gated pick-place controller and dual-conveyor topology. ONET SOC 51-3093.
thoughts:
Design rationale for CP-NEW-machine-tender-load-unload:

1) Topology — dual conveyor: infeed conveyor (y=+0.50) delivers raw blanks from the left; outfeed conveyor (y=-0.50) carries finished parts to the right. UR10 mounted at [0, 0, 0.75] on a 0.75m table. CNC fixture prim centred at [0, 0, 0.80] directly in front of robot — within 0.3m reach.

2) UR10 geometry: reach ~1.3m. Infeed at y=+0.50, fixture at y=0.00, outfeed at y=-0.50. Max distance robot to infeed pick point ≈ 0.50m. All within reach. Belt top infeed = 0.78+0.025 = 0.805m; blank centre z = 0.855m.

3) Machining dwell: setup_pick_place_controller sensor_gated mode with pick_target (at pick sensor above infeed) + drop_target for fixture. After load, a sim_control(action='step', step_count=1800) call (30 s at 60Hz) models the machining cycle before unload move to outfeed. This is represented via pose_sequence ['pick_from_infeed', 'load_to_fixture', 'dwell', 'unload_to_outfeed'] concept baked into thoughts; code reflects two setup_pick_place_controller calls (load phase, unload phase).

4) Fixture prim: thin Cube 0.20x0.15x0.02m at [0, 0.00, 0.795] with PhysicsCollisionAPI. Blank placed on top (z=0.855). V-groove channel represented by a nested notch prim for visual realism.

5) Physics: CPU dynamics (MBP) for determinism. Blank mass 0.5 kg; rubber material on blank for stability. sleepThreshold=0.0 to keep blanks simulated during dwell.

6) Proximity sensors: LoadSensor above fixture approach zone, OutfeedDropSensor above outfeed belt at drop point.

7) Pattern: pick_place with fixture-wait variant — new structural tag isaac:industry.machine_tending not covered by any prior canonical.
code:
# -- Scene skeleton --------------------------------------------------------
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

# Robot table
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[0.7, 1.5, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

# -- Physics: CPU deterministic --------------------------------------------
set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

# -- UR10 robot ------------------------------------------------------------
# Mounted on table at z=0.75. Faces +Y (infeed side) by default.
robot_wizard(
    robot_name="ur10",
    dest_path="/World/UR10",
    position=[0, 0, 0.75],
    orientation=[1, 0, 0, 0],
)

# -- CNC fixture prim ------------------------------------------------------
# Flat platform 0.20x0.15x0.02m at y=0.15 (in front of robot, inside reach).
# Fixture top z = 0.78 + 0.02 = 0.80m; blank centre z = 0.80 + 0.05 = 0.85m.
create_prim(
    prim_path="/World/CNCFixture",
    prim_type="Cube",
    position=[0, 0.15, 0.79],
    scale=[0.10, 0.075, 0.01],
)
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/CNCFixture", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/CNCFixture", attr_name="primvars:displayColor", value=[[0.4, 0.4, 0.45]])

# -- Infeed conveyor (delivers raw blanks from left) -----------------------
# Belt top z = 0.78+0.025 = 0.805; blank centre z = 0.855
create_conveyor(
    prim_path="/World/InfeedBelt",
    position=[0.0, 0.50, 0.78],
    size=[2.5, 0.35, 0.05],
    surface_velocity=[0.12, 0, 0],
)

# -- Outfeed conveyor (carries finished parts away) ------------------------
create_conveyor(
    prim_path="/World/OutfeedBelt",
    position=[0.0, -0.50, 0.78],
    size=[2.5, 0.35, 0.05],
    surface_velocity=[-0.12, 0, 0],
)

# -- 4 raw blanks on infeed belt -------------------------------------------
# Blanks are 0.10m cubes. Staggered x so conveyor transport is visible.
blank_paths = ["/World/Blank_1", "/World/Blank_2", "/World/Blank_3", "/World/Blank_4"]
blank_x_pos = [-1.2, -0.9, -0.6, -0.3]

for path, x in zip(blank_paths, blank_x_pos):
    create_prim(prim_path=path, prim_type="Cube", position=[x, 0.50, 0.855], size=0.05)
    for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
        apply_api_schema(prim_path=path, schema_name=api)
    set_attribute(prim_path=path, attr_name="physics:mass", value=0.5)
    apply_physics_material(prim_path=path, material_name="rubber")

bulk_set_attribute(
    prim_paths=blank_paths,
    attr="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold",
    value=0.0,
)

# -- Proximity sensor: fires when blank arrives at pick zone ---------------
add_proximity_sensor(
    sensor_path="/World/PickSensor",
    position=[0.25, 0.50, 0.855],
    size=[0.08, 0.08, 0.08],
)

# -- PHASE 1: pick blank from infeed, place into CNC fixture ---------------
# sensor_gated coord-IK mode: pick_target above pick zone, drop_target above fixture.
setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path="/World/UR10",
    target_source="curobo",
    robot_family="ur10",
    sensor_path="/World/PickSensor",
    belt_path="/World/InfeedBelt",
    source_paths=blank_paths,
    destination_path="/World/CNCFixture",
    planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", "/World/InfeedBelt", "/World/OutfeedBelt", "/World/CNCFixture"],
)

# -- Machining dwell (30 s sim-time @ 60 Hz = 1800 steps) -----------------
# After the load controller completes, step sim forward to model machining.
sim_control(action="step", step_count=1800)

# -- PHASE 2: pick finished part from fixture, place onto outfeed belt -----
add_proximity_sensor(
    sensor_path="/World/UnloadSensor",
    position=[0, 0.15, 0.90],
    size=[0.12, 0.12, 0.08],
)

setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path="/World/UR10",
    target_source="curobo",
    robot_family="ur10",
    sensor_path="/World/UnloadSensor",
    belt_path="/World/OutfeedBelt",
    source_paths=["/World/CNCFixture"],  # unload phase: pick from fixture, not from blank_paths
    destination_path="/World/OutfeedBelt",
    planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", "/World/InfeedBelt", "/World/OutfeedBelt", "/World/CNCFixture"],
)
failure_modes: sim_control(step) may not advance controller state machine — dwell step_count may need tuning per Hz
dual setup_pick_place_controller calls share robot articulation path — second call may overwrite first controller binding
outfeed destination_path is a moving belt, not a bin — drop_target needs override if blank must land at specific x
UR10 robot_family='ur10' must be registered in cuRobo config; falls back to franka if missing
simulate_args_template field is aspirational (patched-r-a20-fix): no re-instantiation consumer exists yet in scripts/ or service/; treat as documentation of intent for future canonical re-render.
code_template:
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[0.7, 1.5, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})
robot_wizard(robot_name={{primary_robot.class}}, dest_path={{primary_robot.path}}, position={{primary_robot.position}}, orientation={{primary_robot.orientation}})
create_prim(prim_path={{cnc_fixture.path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{cnc_fixture.position}}, scale={{cnc_fixture.scale}})
apply_api_schema(prim_path={{cnc_fixture.path}}, schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
create_conveyor(prim_path={{infeed_conveyor.path}}, position={{infeed_conveyor.position}}, size={{infeed_conveyor.size}}, surface_velocity={{infeed_conveyor.surface_velocity}})
create_conveyor(prim_path={{outfeed_conveyor.path}}, position={{outfeed_conveyor.position}}, size={{outfeed_conveyor.size}}, surface_velocity={{outfeed_conveyor.surface_velocity}})
add_proximity_sensor(sensor_path={{pick_sensor.path}}, position={{pick_sensor.position}}, size={{pick_sensor.size}})
setup_pick_place_controller(robot_path={{primary_robot.path}}, target_source="curobo", robot_family={{primary_robot.class}}, sensor_path={{pick_sensor.path}}, belt_path={{infeed_conveyor.path}}, source_paths=[{{workpieces[0].path}}, {{workpieces[1].path}}, {{workpieces[2].path}}, {{workpieces[3].path}}], destination_path={{cnc_fixture.path}}, planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", {{infeed_conveyor.path}}, {{outfeed_conveyor.path}}, {{cnc_fixture.path}}])
sim_control(action="step", step_count=1800)
add_proximity_sensor(sensor_path={{unload_sensor.path}}, position={{unload_sensor.position}}, size={{unload_sensor.size}})
setup_pick_place_controller(robot_path={{primary_robot.path}}, target_source="curobo", robot_family={{primary_robot.class}}, sensor_path={{unload_sensor.path}}, belt_path={{outfeed_conveyor.path}}, source_paths=[{{cnc_fixture.path}}], destination_path={{outfeed_conveyor.path}}, planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", {{infeed_conveyor.path}}, {{outfeed_conveyor.path}}, {{cnc_fixture.path}}])
